query: SELECT cs.id, cs.titulo, cs.urlMedia, LENGTH(cs.urlMedia) as url_length FROM carousel_slides cs LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VQ33uv9UCCJC5i3.a43d655f061c --database LDyffp73FNnPjitdoAxnFa --execute SELECT cs.id, cs.titulo, cs.urlMedia, LENGTH(cs.urlMedia) as url_length FROM carousel_slides cs LIMIT 5;
